name: schedule_xtime_appointment
description: Books a service appointment at the dealership through the Xtime middleware. Use this once you have collected the customer's contact info, vehicle, requested service, and a desired appointment time.
execution_message_description: Give me one moment while I get that appointment booked for you.

customer_phone.description: Caller's phone number in E.164 form, e.g. +19785551234.

customer_email.description: Caller's email address if they provided one.

vehicle_vin.description: 17-char VIN if the caller knows it.

service_requested.description: What the customer wants done, in their own words. E.g. 'oil change', 'tire rotation', '60k service'.

appointment_time.description: Requested appointment time as ISO-8601 (preferred) or 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm'.

transportation.description: How the customer wants to handle transportation.

dealer_slug.description: Optional dealer override; defaults to the dealer associated with the inbound number.
